assignments.name: incident_description
assignments.value: An employee reported receiving a phishing email containing a malicious attachment. The attachment was opened on a workstation connected to the internal network. The employee's credentials may have been compromised, and unusual outbound traffic was detected from the affected machine to an unknown external IP address.

parameters.text:
=You are a cybersecurity incident triage analyst. Analyze the following security incident and provide your assessment.

Incident Description:
{{ $json.incident_description }}

You MUST respond in EXACTLY this format (no extra text before or after):

SEVERITY: [Critical/High/Medium/Low]
CATEGORY: [Phishing/Malware/Data Breach/Unauthorized Access/DDoS/Insider Threat/Other]
SUMMARY: [One sentence summary of the incident]
IMMEDIATE_ACTIONS: [List 3 immediate actions to take, separated by semicolons]
RISK_SCORE: [A number from 1 to 10]

assignments.name: response_action
escalation_level
assignments.value: EMERGENCY - Notify SOC, CISO, and Management

assignments.name: response_action

parameters.text:
=You are a senior cybersecurity reviewer. Review the following incident triage assessment and determine if it is accurate.

Original Incident: An employee reported receiving a phishing email containing a malicious attachment. The attachment was opened on a workstation connected to the internal network. The employee's credentials may have been compromised, and unusual outbound traffic was detected from the affected machine to an unknown external IP address.

Triage Assessment:
- Severity: {{ $json.severity || $input.first().json.severity }}
- Category: {{ $json.category || $input.first().json.category }}
- Risk Score: {{ $json.risk_score || $input.first().json.risk_score }}/10

Respond in EXACTLY this format:
VALIDATION: [Correct/Incorrect]
REASON: [One sentence explanation]
ADJUSTED_SEVERITY: [Critical/High/Medium/Low if adjustment needed, or Same]
